apiKey.description: E2B API key (e2b.dev -> Settings -> API Keys)

config.template: Optional E2B sandbox template name (defaults to "base").
config.timeout: Optional sandbox lifetime in milliseconds before kill/pause (defaults to 300000). This is the sandbox TTL, not a per-command timeout — see commandTimeout.
config.commandTimeout: Optional per-command timeout in milliseconds for foreground commands (bash tool, exec/shell; defaults to 120000). A timed-out command returns exit code 124 instead of hanging the turn. Per-call timeoutMs overrides it.
config.env: Optional environment variables injected into the sandbox at cold-start, persistent across all commands.
